Based on the provided PDF, the paper describes a novel approach to malware detection called GNGRUE, which demonstrates superior performance in handling large volumes of data while achieving high accuracy scores and ROC curve values. The authors evaluated the performance of their proposed ensemble strategy and compared it with existing techniques using various assessment metrics, including F1-score, accuracy, precision, recall, ROC-AUC, and MCC. The results show that GNGRUE outperformed the existing methods, with a high MCC value indicating superior performance in correctly identifying malware samples.

I would categorize this paper as "Demonstrated." The paper presents a concrete implementation of a malware detection approach, evaluates its performance, and compares it with existing techniques, demonstrating its effectiveness in handling large volumes of data.
